candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred candidate and matches total revenue/sales concept exactly.

candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not revenue.

variables.notes: R:nc.Using the reported revenue line as priority list. 'Total Revenue' is preferred; 'Net Sales' is a valid fallback if label changes across years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net Sales

candidates.why: Acquisition-related item, not cost of goods sold/cost of sales.

variables.notes: No clear COGS/cost of sales line is present on the income statement. The statement appears to present operating expenses by nature rather than showing a dedicated COGS row.

candidates.why: Acquisition/revaluation item; non-recurring and not SG&A overhead.
Core operating overhead/personnel cost and strong SG&A component candidate.

candidates.row_label: Capitalised development work done by own employees
candidates.why: Capitalization offset related to development work, not a normal SG&A overhead expense bucket.
Specific unusual item, not a standard recurring SG&A bucket.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement SG&A.
Operational statistic, not an expense row.

variables.notes: R:nc. No explicit SG&A row exists. Selected the best overhead buckets: 'Compensation to Employees' from candidates and 'Other expenses' from the full A-column because the candidate list clearly misses this major operating overhead line. Excluded depreciation/amortisation, balancing rows, and unusual items such as acquisition/cyberattack-specific lines. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other expenses

candidates.row_label: Capitalised development work done by own employees
candidates.why: Development-related line, but it is a capitalization offset rather than a dedicated R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related but below operating profit and amortization/supplemental, not current-period above-EBIT R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalised Development Expenses- Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization line, not current R&D expense.
Balancing line, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated current-period R&D expense row is clearly reported above operating income. 'Capitalised development work done by own employees' appears to be a capitalization offset, and the amortization line is supplemental/below EBIT.

candidates.why: Finance-cost total, but underlying recurring components are available so granular rows are preferred.
Direct recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease interest component; should be included with interest expense.
Recurring finance-cost component and appropriate if not clearly one-off.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid double counting when main line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost components and excluded FX-related rows and the total 'Financial expenses' row to avoid double counting.
